channel.title: Posts on Rudra Murthy
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Rudra Murthy

item.title: Monolingual NER Results for various Languages
item.description: The Neural NER system implemented by me as part of the papers https://murthyrudra.github.io/publication/low-resource-tallip/ and https://murthyrudra.github.io/publication/p-18-2064/ achieves the following F1-Scores on various languages. Results Language Dataset Link Word Embeddings Reference F1-Score English CoNLL 2003 Spectral Embeddings https://arxiv.org/abs/1607.00198 90.94 Spanish CoNLL 2002 Spectral Embeddings https://arxiv.org/abs/1607.00198 85.75 Dutch CoNLL 2002 Spectral Embeddings https://arxiv.org/abs/1607.00198 85.20 German https://nlpado.de/~sebastian/software/ner_german.shtml Spectral Embeddings https://aclanthology.info/papers/P18-2064/p18-2064 87.

item.title: Trekking
item.description: I have recently gained interest in Trekking. Here is a list of trekking spots visited by me and which you should never forget to visit. Tikona Fort Rajmachi Kothaligad Sagargad Raigad Fort Mahuli Fort Katraj Sinhagad Night Trek Korigad Fort Kalavantindurg Stay Tuned for more updates
